items.title: ITV commentator reveals he makes his own TOOTHPASTE after eating habits divided fans at World Cup
items.summary: ANDROS TOWNSEND'S has stunned fans after revealing he makes his own TOOTHPASTE. The former England and Tottenham Hotspur star revealed that he has taken charge of his own tooth care on social media. Townsend, 35, shared a post on Instagram which included a video of himself making his own toothpaste.
